data.title: 国际服Blue Archive Steam发布
data.summary: Hello, this is Blue Archive. We would like to inform you that the release schedule for the STEAM cli
data.body:
Hello, this is Blue Archive.

We would like to inform you that the release schedule for the STEAM client has been confirmed for Friday, July 4 at 1:00 AM UTC.

We sincerely apologize once again for any inconvenience caused by the delay.

Despite our shortcomings, we are truly grateful to all Senseis who patiently waited for such a long time, and we have prepared a compensation gift to express our appreciation.

We will do our utmost to ensure that our sincere dedication comes through to all of you.

Thank you.

📷Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3007294

#BlueArchive #BlueArchiveSTEAM


![BAGrandopenEN.png](https://kivo.wiki/files/1373/PWpmLBoqvHgg4I6K55iBphjvZBw3w7P9.png)

Sensei! Please kindly claim the compensation for the STEAM client launch delay in game.

- 10-Recruitment Ticket x1
- AP x 300

*Claim Period
7/4(Fri) 1:00 AM – 7/11(Fri) 2:59 PM (UTC)
